text:
DISCHARGE SUMMERY
Patient Name:
AGE: - 56y/M
UHID NO: - 1767
IPD NO: 81/IPD25COHO
Date & Time of Admission: - 22-01-2026 - 10:30 PM
Date & Time of Discharge: 29.01.2026 4:00 PM
Treating Consultant:
DEPT: - GENERAL MEDICINE
DIAGNOSIS: - ACC HTN / Enteric fever / AGE / UTI / LRTI
CHIEF cOMPLAINT: - High grade fever with chills, pain abdomen with vomiting & nausea, loose motion.
Patient also had headache restlessness, cough with expectoration and pain in throat.
PAST MEDICAL HISTORY: - K/C/O Hypertension
PAST SURGICAL HISTORY: - Not significant
FAMILY HISTORY: - Not significant
KNOWN DRUG/FOOD ALLERGY: - Patient has no H/O substance abuse, no significant history
of allergy to any drug (as per history given by patient).
Vitals on Arrival: BP: 210/122 mmHg, PR: 118/min, Sp02: 90% on RA, Temp: 102.6°F, RR: 24/min, Pain
Score: 8/10 RBS: 126 mg/dl.
cOuRsE IN HOsPITAL: - Patient reported to casualty on 22.01.2026 with complaint of High grade
fever with chills, pain abdomen with vomiting & nausea, loose motion. Patient also had headache
restlessness, cough with expectoration and pain in throat.
22.01.26 & 26.01.26 - Patient was admitted in ICU. Start monitoring of vitals Medication administered as per
prescription.O2 therapy administered as per condition of the patient. IV fluids administered as per prescription;
I/O charting maintained
27.01.2026 - Patient shifted to the HDU as symptomatically improving. Monitoring of vitals continued. IV
medicines continued
28.01.2026 - Patient shifted to the ward as symptomatically better. Planned discharge on 29.01.2026 on oral
medication
Medication as advised during hospitalization:
Inj Monocef 1gm BD
Inj PCM 1gm BD
Inj Pantop BD
Inj Emset BD
Tab Azee 500mg BD
Nebulization with Duolin and Budecort TDS
7.Tab Montair Lc HS
8Nasivion Nasal Drop 2 drops BD
Tab Mucinac BD
10. Tab Udiliv 300 BD
